user_profiles.title: UserProfile
user_profiles.description: User profile settings and customization attributes.

userId.description: Unique user ID matching Firebase Auth UID.

avatarUrl.description: Custom avatar image URL or data URL.

avatarColor.description: Ambient gradient accent hex color code for the profile icon.

avatarIcon.description: Selected theme preset icon for the customizable profile.

preferredLanguage.description: The user's preferred native language for the voice translator.

preferredModel.description: The preferred LLM selected by the user for chat completions.

updatedAt.description: Server timestamp of the last profile update.

chats.title: Chat
chats.description: A conversation thread created by the user.

chatId.description: Unique key identifier for the chat session.

userId.description: Owner UID of this chat session.

title.description: Derived topic or custom title of the chat.

updatedAt.description: When the thread was last written to.

messages.title: Message
messages.description: An individual chat bubble exchange containing sentiment, language, and potential media.

chatId.description: Foreign key reference to parent chat.

sender.description: Indicates if message was sent by human user or conversational AI.

sentiment.description: Real-time computed sentiment tags from model response.

detectedLanguage.description: The ISO language code detected for this conversation turn.

imageUrl.description: Base64 payload or public media URL for AI-generated images.

audioBase64.description: Generated speech snippet base64 stream so speech is persistable across devices.

/user_profiles/{userId}.description: Stores user customization configurations, preferences, and avatars.

/chats/{chatId}.description: Contains a list of conversation sessions grouped per user.

/chats/{chatId}/messages/{messageId}.description: Subcollection housing message history bubbles for high-performance retrieval.
